metadata.title: Amadeus - The Original Place for Ribs
metadata.description: Belgium's iconic all-you-can-eat spareribs restaurant. Five unique locations in Ghent, Brussels, Antwerp and Lozer. Book your table now.

hero.subtitle: All-you-can-eat spareribs in a warm, atmospheric setting. Five iconic locations across Belgium.

concept.ribsDesc: Our legendary spareribs, glazed to perfection and served until you say stop.
concept.locationsDesc: From historic Ghent to vibrant Brussels and Antwerp.
concept.heritageDesc: A quarter century of unforgettable dining experiences.

ribsShowcase.title: Ribs That Made Us Famous
ribsShowcase.description: Slow-cooked to fall-off-the-bone tenderness, glazed with our secret house sauce, and served in generous portions. At Amadeus, ribs aren't just a dish — they're an experience. Enjoy our all-you-can-eat spareribs with unlimited sides in a setting that feels like home.

locationsSection.title: Find Your Amadeus
locationsSection.subtitle: Five unique locations, each with its own character. One unforgettable experience.

items.quote: The best ribs I've ever had. The atmosphere is incredible and the all-you-can-eat concept is unbeatable. We keep coming back!
items.author: Sophie D.

items.quote: Perfect for our group dinner. 20 friends, endless ribs, amazing evening. Amadeus never disappoints.
items.author: Thomas V.

items.quote: A must-visit when in Belgium. The interior alone is worth the trip, and the ribs are simply outstanding.
items.author: Maria L.

items.quote: We celebrated our anniversary here and it was perfect. Warm atmosphere, generous portions, and that Irish Coffee to finish — magical.
items.author: Jan & Lien

groupDining.title: Celebrate Together
groupDining.description: From intimate dinners to grand celebrations with 40+ guests. Amadeus is the perfect setting for birthdays, team events, family gatherings, and unforgettable group experiences.

reservationBanner.title: Ready for Legendary Ribs?
reservationBanner.subtitle: Reserve your table at any of our five locations.

meta.title: Our Story - 25+ Years of Legendary Ribs
meta.description: Discover the Amadeus story. From a single restaurant in Ghent's Patershol to five beloved locations across Belgium.

about.heroSubtitle: A quarter century of legendary ribs, warm atmospheres, and unforgettable evenings.

origin.title: From Patershol to All of Belgium
origin.p1: In 1998, Amadeus opened its doors in the heart of Ghent's Patershol district. What started as a simple idea — serve the best ribs at the best price in the warmest atmosphere — quickly became a beloved Belgian institution.
origin.p2: Today, with five locations across Ghent, Brussels, Antwerp, and Lozer, we continue to live by the same philosophy that made our first guests fall in love: generous portions, genuine hospitality, and ribs that keep you coming back.
origin.p3: Each Amadeus restaurant has its own unique character, housed in carefully restored historic buildings filled with antiques, warm lighting, and the unmistakable aroma of ribs on the grill.

generous.title: Generous Portions
generous.description: All-you-can-eat isn't just our concept — it's our promise. No one leaves hungry.

atmosphere.title: Warm Atmosphere
atmosphere.description: Antique-filled interiors, soft lighting, and the perfect backdrop for every occasion.

quality.title: Consistent Quality
quality.description: The same high standards across every location, every dish, every evening.

accessible.title: Accessible Premium
accessible.description: Premium dining without the pretension. Everyone is welcome at Amadeus.

about.quote: "We didn't just want to serve ribs. We wanted to create evenings people remember."

meta.title: Our Restaurants - Find Your Nearest Amadeus
meta.description: Visit Amadeus in Ghent, Brussels, Antwerp, or Lozer. Five unique restaurants, each with all-you-can-eat ribs and unforgettable atmosphere.

locations.heroSubtitle: Five unique locations across Belgium. One legendary experience.

gent1.name: Amadeus Gent 1 — Patershol
gent1.description: The original Amadeus. Nestled in the charming Patershol district, our first restaurant has been serving legendary ribs for over 25 years. A historic building filled with antiques and warm atmosphere.
gent1.features: Historic Patershol location • The original Amadeus • Antique-filled interior • Terrace available

gent2.name: Amadeus Gent 2 — Belfort
gent2.description: Located at the Gouden Leeuwplein near the iconic Belfort tower, our second Ghent location offers the same legendary ribs experience with stunning city center views. Spacious and perfect for large groups.
gent2.features: Near the Belfort • Large capacity • City center • Group-friendly

brussel.name: Amadeus Brussel
brussel.description: In the heart of Brussels near Sint-Katelijne, Amadeus brings its iconic ribs experience to the capital. A unique setting where Belgian heritage meets unforgettable flavors.
brussel.features: Near Grand Place • City center • Unique interior • Tourist-friendly

antwerpen.name: Amadeus Antwerpen
antwerpen.description: On the beautiful Suikerrui with views of the Cathedral, Amadeus Antwerp is the perfect pre-event dinner spot. Ideal before concerts at Sportpaleis or a night out in the city.
antwerpen.features: Cathedral view • Near Sportpaleis • City center • Pre-event dining

lozer.name: Amadeus Lozer
lozer.description: Our countryside gem in Kruishoutem. Amadeus Lozer offers a more spacious and relaxed setting with a large garden. Perfect for large groups and celebrations in a rural Belgian atmosphere.
lozer.features: Countryside setting • Large garden • 200+ capacity • Ample parking

brugge.name: Amadeus Brugge
brugge.description: Amadeus is coming to Bruges! Our newest location in this historic city will open its doors in 2026. Stay tuned for more details.

meta.title: Menu - All-You-Can-Eat Ribs & More
meta.description: Discover the Amadeus menu. All-you-can-eat spareribs, grilled specialties, fresh salads, desserts, and our famous Irish Coffee.

menu.heroSubtitle: From legendary ribs to irresistible desserts. Every dish crafted with passion.
menu.signatureDescription: The heart of Amadeus. Choose your favorite glaze, enjoy unlimited ribs with sides, and eat until your heart's content. Our ribs are slow-cooked for hours, tender on the inside with a perfect char on the outside.

spareribs.name: Classic Spareribs
spareribs.description: Our signature ribs with house marinade, slow-cooked to perfection. Served all-you-can-eat with fries and salad.

spareribs_bbq.name: BBQ Spareribs
spareribs_bbq.description: Smoky barbecue glazed ribs, caramelized and irresistible. All-you-can-eat with sides.

spareribs_honey.name: Honey Mustard Spareribs
spareribs_honey.description: Sweet honey and tangy mustard glaze over tender spareribs. All-you-can-eat.

mixed_grill.name: Mixed Grill
mixed_grill.description: A generous platter of grilled meats with seasonal vegetables and fries.

salmon.name: Grilled Salmon
salmon.description: Fresh Atlantic salmon, perfectly grilled, with a lemon-herb butter and seasonal sides.

prawns.name: King Prawns
prawns.description: Succulent king prawns in garlic butter, served with rice and fresh salad.

soup.name: Soup of the Day
soup.description: Freshly made daily with seasonal ingredients. Ask your server for today's creation.

garlic_bread.name: Garlic Bread
garlic_bread.description: Crispy baguette with melted garlic butter and herbs.

caesar.name: Caesar Salad
caesar.description: Crisp romaine lettuce, parmesan, croutons, and classic Caesar dressing.

veggie.name: Vegetarian Plate
veggie.description: A colorful selection of seasonal vegetables, hummus, and grains.

dame_blanche.name: Dame Blanche
dame_blanche.description: Vanilla ice cream with warm Belgian chocolate sauce and whipped cream.

tiramisu.name: Tiramisu
tiramisu.description: Classic Italian tiramisu with mascarpone cream and espresso-soaked ladyfingers.

irish_coffee.name: Irish Coffee
irish_coffee.description: Our famous Irish Coffee. Rich coffee, Irish whiskey, and fresh cream. A perfect ending.

house_wine_red.name: House Red Wine
house_wine_red.description: Carefully selected red wine by the glass.

house_wine_white.name: House White Wine
house_wine_white.description: Refreshing white wine by the glass.

meta.description: Book your table at Amadeus. Easy online reservation at any of our five locations. All-you-can-eat ribs await you.

reservations.heroSubtitle: Secure your spot for an unforgettable evening of legendary ribs.

reservations.walkIn: No reservation? You're still welcome! Walk-ins are accepted subject to availability.
reservations.groupNote: Planning a group of 10+? Check our {link} for custom arrangements.

meta.title: Groups & Events - Celebrate at Amadeus
meta.description: Plan your group dinner, birthday, team event, or celebration at Amadeus. Custom menus for groups of 10 to 200+ guests.

groups.heroSubtitle: The perfect setting for celebrations, team dinners, and unforgettable group experiences.

intro.title: Celebrate with Legendary Ribs
intro.description: Whether it's a birthday, team event, family reunion, or any special occasion — Amadeus has the space, the atmosphere, and the food to make it memorable. Our locations accommodate groups from 10 to 200+ guests, with custom menu options and dedicated service.

capacity.title: Flexible Capacity
capacity.description: From intimate groups of 10 to celebrations of 200+. For groups of 40+, we even open outside regular hours.

menus.title: Custom Group Menus
menus.description: Choose from our standard group packages or create a custom menu tailored to your event.

locations.title: Five Unique Venues
locations.description: Each Amadeus location offers its own character — from city center to countryside.

service.title: Dedicated Service
service.description: A personal coordinator to ensure your event runs smoothly from start to finish.

meta.title: Jobs - Work at Amadeus
meta.description: Join the Amadeus team. We're looking for passionate people to join our restaurants in Ghent, Brussels, Antwerp, and Lozer.

jobs.heroSubtitle: Join a team that's passionate about great food, warm hospitality, and unforgettable experiences.
jobs.intro: Amadeus is always looking for enthusiastic team members. Whether you're an experienced server, a kitchen professional, or looking for your first job in hospitality — we'd love to hear from you.

server.title: Server / Waiter
server.description: Provide warm, attentive service to our guests. Experience in hospitality is a plus but not required.

kitchen.title: Kitchen Staff
kitchen.description: Join our kitchen team. Help prepare our legendary ribs and other dishes.

bartender.title: Bartender
bartender.description: Craft our famous Irish Coffees and serve drinks with flair.

spontaneous.title: Spontaneous Application
spontaneous.description: Don't see your perfect role? We're always interested in meeting passionate people. Send us your details and we'll be in touch.

meta.title: Contact Us
meta.description: Get in touch with Amadeus. Questions, feedback, or group proposals — we're here to help.

contact.heroSubtitle: Questions, feedback, or proposals? We'd love to hear from you.

meta.title: Frequently Asked Questions
meta.description: Everything you need to know about Amadeus. Reservations, menus, group bookings, and more.

faq.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know about dining at Amadeus.

allYouCanEat.question: How does the all-you-can-eat concept work?
allYouCanEat.answer: At Amadeus, you choose your favorite rib glaze and we keep serving until you say stop. Your meal includes unlimited spareribs, fries, and salad. It's our signature concept and the reason people keep coming back!

reservation.question: Do I need a reservation?
reservation.answer: We recommend making a reservation, especially for weekends and holidays. You can book online through our website or call the restaurant directly. Walk-ins are welcome subject to availability.

walkIn.question: Can I walk in without a reservation?
walkIn.answer: Absolutely! Walk-ins are welcome at all our locations. However, we can't guarantee a table during peak hours, so we recommend reserving in advance for the best experience.

groupBooking.question: How do I book for a large group?
groupBooking.answer: For groups of 10 or more, we recommend contacting us through our Groups & Events page. For groups of 40+, we can even open outside regular hours. We offer custom group menus and dedicated service.

sameDay.question: Can I make a same-day reservation?
sameDay.answer: Yes! You can book online for same-day dining until 5 PM. After 5 PM, please call the restaurant directly to check availability.

vegetarian.question: Do you have vegetarian options?
vegetarian.answer: Yes, our menu includes vegetarian dishes such as salads, a vegetarian plate, soups, and several sides. While ribs are our specialty, we make sure everyone at the table has something delicious to enjoy.

giftVoucher.question: Can I buy a gift voucher?
giftVoucher.answer: Yes! Gift vouchers are available at all our locations. They make a perfect gift for any rib lover. Ask at the restaurant or contact us for more information.

parking.question: Is there parking available?
parking.answer: Parking varies by location. Our Lozer restaurant has ample free parking. For city locations (Ghent, Brussels, Antwerp), we recommend public parking garages nearby. Our staff can provide directions.

privateEvent.question: Can I host a private event?
privateEvent.answer: Yes! We can accommodate private events and celebrations at all our locations. For exclusive use of the restaurant, groups of 40+ can book outside regular hours. Contact us for a custom proposal.

locations.question: How many locations does Amadeus have?
locations.answer: Amadeus currently has five operating locations: two in Ghent (Patershol and Belfort), one in Brussels, one in Antwerp, and one in Lozer (Kruishoutem). We're also opening a new location in Bruges in 2026!

openingHours.question: What are your opening hours?
openingHours.answer: Most of our restaurants are open Tuesday to Sunday for dinner service (from 18:00) and on Sundays also for lunch (from 12:00). We're closed on Mondays. Hours may vary by location — check the specific location page for details.

children.question: Are children welcome?
children.answer: Amadeus is a family-friendly restaurant. Children are very welcome, and they can enjoy our all-you-can-eat ribs at a reduced price. High chairs are available at all locations.

footer.description: Belgium's iconic all-you-can-eat spareribs restaurant. Five unique locations with unforgettable atmosphere since 1998.
footer.newsletter: Stay in touch with our latest news and offers.
